metadata.description: One Claude Code skill that builds a clean personal homepage for young professionals — researchers and engineers — from LinkedIn + GitHub + (optional) Google Scholar. Deployed to GitHub Pages, zero build step.

plugins.name: personal-website-claude-skill
plugins.description: Build a monochrome personal homepage for an AI / ML researcher or technical young professional from LinkedIn + GitHub + (optional) Google Scholar. Static single-page site, two-column layout, bilingual toggle (EN + auto-detected second language), light / dark theme, live Scholar citation widget. Deployed to GitHub Pages with zero build step.
